subject: Physical Education
chapter: Yoga as Preventive Measure for Lifestyle Diseases

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Yoga is an effective preventive measure for lifestyle diseases.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It helps in reducing stress and anxiety levels in individuals.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Yoga is an effective preventive measure for lifestyle diseases as it helps in reducing stress and anxiety levels in individuals, which in turn helps in preventing lifestyle diseases.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): Yoga can improve cardiovascular health.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
